translated: So, about that Grand Fleur commercial...
What did you all think of the footage
that actually aired in the story?
When I record for the game, I usually record my lines alone.
It seems Hagiyama-san had already finished her voice recording, and we had some lines to say in unison.
There was a line where Hagiyama-san and Shizuku, along with the others, had to say "Grand Fleur" together.
Normally, for lines in unison, they play the previously recorded voice into my headphones,
and I listen to that while recording my part to match the timing.
That's the usual pattern for delivering perfectly synchronized voices to everyone, but get this...
We recorded that without matching it to anything.
And yet, it was so perfectly in sync!
I was so surprised. I saw the finished version at the same time as all of you, and it was amazing.
I got an "OK" right away. I thought I might have to redo it, but I guess
Hagiyama-chan and Shizuku were just naturally on the same wavelength.
I can't believe that actually happened!
The lines were actually quite long, too, like "The new Floraison Éclat..."
I even looked up what kind of color "Floraison Éclat" was.
It seemed like a really beautiful floral color.
I was just so shocked.
I'm glad everyone is saying it's amazing, too.
I thought that was a pretty rare occurrence.
It makes me happy that these two, who met as good rivals, could be so in sync.
I hope they continue to push each other to new heights alongside the other girls from RE:LITE.
I really do.
Let's talk a bit more.
Right.
Going back to the flashback scenes for a moment... when Shizuku was searching for what she was lacking,
MIKU-chan was in Shizuku's room, and Shizuku decided to watch some old footage...
